judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong revenue and earnings growth, but high valuation multiples and thin profit margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 18.0%; next earnings date is 2026-04-30.
positives: Revenue growth 20.0% YoY — indicates strong market demand for its services.
Earnings growth 375.0% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 350.3% — significant profitability expansion.
Forward P/E 27.64x and PEG ratio 0.35 — suggests growth may outpace valuation concerns.
Free cash flow $879.87M TTM — healthy cash generation.
Consensus buy rating from 28 analysts with a mean target of $195.09.
negatives: Trailing P/E 276.28x — extremely high valuation based on past earnings.
Profit margin 2.0% and Return on equity 1.3% — profitability is thin relative to revenue.
Debt/Equity 13.72 — high leverage on the balance sheet.
Analyst growth estimates for current Q (11.1%) and FY (16.8%) are lower than historical growth rates.

news.paragraph: While the provided headline discusses a competitor, Bandwidth, receiving a target boost due to AI opportunities, it does not directly pertain to Twilio (TWLO). Traders should note that the broader sector sentiment around AI could indirectly influence Twilio's perception, but there is no specific catalyst mentioned for TWLO itself. The next earnings date is April 30th, which may provide a more direct catalyst.

headlines.title: Bandwidth (BAND) Gets A Major Target Boost As Voice AI Opportunities Expand
